actionUnits.condition: This object has a BoxCollider (enabled=1, isTrigger=0) and no Rigidbody, so it supports Trigger interactions. The attached MonoBehaviour (m_Script guid=1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d, script_fileID not explicitly provided in-scene listing) corresponds exactly to Fire.cs. However, Fire.cs exposes no public parameterless methods (WaterHit(Vector3), SetIsOn(bool), UpdateFireState(bool) all require parameters), and there are no UnityEvent m_Calls configured. Therefore, no direct method calls can be invoked via Trigger. This action validates collider interaction and lets Awake/Update run under default serialized settings: isOn=0, timeToOnMin=40, timeToOnMax=60, shouldTurnOn=0, onNeighborsThreshold=2, etc. Note: m_PrefabInstance fileID was not provided; using the provided GameObject fileID 306998884.
